text.title: Design Tokens Fundamentals Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying design-tokens-fundamentals; each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Components reference primitives directly; dark mode requires editing every component.
antipattern.fix: Insert semantic tier (`color.text.primary`); themes override semantic only.

antipattern.symptom: Token used in body text fails 4.5:1; defect discovered at audit time.
antipattern.fix: Compute + bake contrast_ratio + pass on every text token; CI blocks pass=false.

antipattern.symptom: Animations play for users with prefers-reduced-motion.
antipattern.root-cause: Motion token defined as duration only, no variant.
antipattern.fix: Every motion token: { duration, reduced_motion_variant }; consumer respects OS pref + system override.
